---
title: "Research featured in U.N. Special Rapporteur report to the General Assembly"
date: "2025-10-22"
categories: [recognition]
---

My research was featured in [U.N. Special Rapporteur Olivier De Schutter's report](https://www.srpoverty.org/2025/10/01/far-right-populism-and-the-future-of-social-protection/) on how economic insecurity has fueled far-right politics, presented to the United Nations General Assembly. The original study, ["Politics of Boundary Consolidation: Income Inequality, Ethnonationalism, and Radical-Right Voting"](https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/full/10.1177/23780231241251714) appeared in *Socius*.
